channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Prime Day is almost over, but these are still the best Apple deals I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its final hours, but whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll still find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 remains at its best price to date, while the AirPods Pro 3 are still on sale for $179. […]

item.title: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
item.description: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular […]

item.title: 24 Prime Day deals Verge readers are grabbing before Prime Day ends
item.description: There are an overwhelming number of Prime Day deals to sort through, which is why we spend so much time highlighting products we’ve already tested and can stand behind. But our recommendations are only one way to identify a worthwhile deal: another is seeing which products fellow Verge readers actually buy. Below, we’ve rounded up […]

item.title: Pour quelques partenaires américains | Washington réautorise l’IA la plus puissante d’Anthropic
item.description: Après deux semaines de blocage inédit, le gouvernement américain a réautorisé vendredi le modèle d’intelligence artificielle (IA) le plus puissant d’Anthropic, pour un petit cercle de partenaires uniquement américains, confirmant la reprise en main de Washington sur cette technologie stratégique.

item.title: NYT Connections Sports Edition today: Hints and answers for June 27, 2026
item.description: Connections: Sports Edition is a New York Times word game about finding common sports threads between words. How to solve the day's puzzle.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for June 27, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for June 27, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for June 27, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for June 27, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1834 on June 27 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for June 27, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Anthropic gets US government's permission to redeploy its Mythos cybersecurity AI model
item.description: Anthropic is restoring select organizations' access to Mythos after getting permission from the US government.
